response: Acme Corp, a 342-employee company headquartered in Austin, Texas, generated $54.4 million in total annual revenue, with quarterly earnings breaking down to $12.3 million in Q1, $14.1 million in Q2, $11.8 million in Q3, and a year-high $16.2 million in Q4. That full-year performance marks an 18% year-over-year growth for the firm, reflecting a solid annual uptick that capped a period of steady operational expansion for the Austin-based business.
